data.title: Analyst Bullish on Shiba Inu, Sees 235% Surge Despite Recent Fall
data.description: The cryptocurrency market has shown resilience following a significant downturn, with Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) leading the recovery.

data.title: Bill Ackman's Advice: 'Stay Away From Shorting Stocks, Avoid Commodity-Sensitive Industries, And You Do Great'
data.description: If your investment portfolio feels like a headache right now, legendary investor Bill Ackman says not to worry—it'll eventually be a "blip."

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Eric Trump Predicts Inflation Drop Through Energy Policies And Spending Cuts
data.description: Eric Trump recently shared his views on tariffs, inflation and Federal Reserve policy.

data.title: Biden Student Loan Forgiveness Tops $180 Billion With Latest Relief
data.description: The Biden administration has made another major move to tackle the student debt crisis, approving $4.28 billion in loan forgiveness for nearly 55,000 public service workers.

data.title: Car Rams Into Christmas Market in Germany, Killing Five and Injuring More Than 200
data.description: A car-ramming attack at a Christmas market in Magdeburg, Germany, on Friday night has left five people dead, including a nine-year-old child.
